summary: The diff addresses all four requirements (REQ-32 through REQ-35). Home.tsx has WIPO references and hypothetical statistics removed, Whitepaper.tsx has the WIPO/Sovereign IP section replaced with 'Global IP Ecosystem Interoperability' and the TOC updated, Footer.tsx no longer contains WIPO references, and the file summaries confirm audits of Header.tsx, IPDatabase.tsx, and RegisterIP.tsx. All changes appear to be in scope and correctly implemented based on the available evidence.
